title: Using Highlight
instructions: Highlight a piece of content with default color (yellow). Highlight a piece of content with orange. Highlight a piece of content with cyan.
hint: #highlight[highlight a piece of content], you can use #highlight(fill:xxx) to specify the color. The color can be a color name, a hex color code, or an RGB color value. The RGB color value for this exercise can be found in the comments.
